#!/usr/bin/env bash
max_age=90
while IFS=: read -r username _ uid _; do
  [[ $uid -lt 1000 ]] && continue
  # Check if account has a password hash in /etc/shadow
  shadow_entry=$(grep "^${username}:" /etc/shadow)
  [[ -z $shadow_entry ]] && continue
  pw_hash=$(cut -d: -f2 <<<"$shadow_entry")
  if [[ $pw_hash == "*" || $pw_hash == "!" ]]; then
    continue
  fi
  if chage -M "$max_age" "$username" 2>>/dev/stderr; then
    echo "Set max age for $username"
  else
    echo "Failed to set max age for $username" >&2
  fi
done < /etc/passwd
